message:
feat(parser): add semantic analysis, parse metrics, and SQLite-compat lexer fixes

Add a new semantic analysis module (semantic.rs) that performs name resolution,
type checking, and scope validation against a schema. This enables catching
column/table reference errors, function arity mismatches, and CTE scoping
issues before execution.

Parser changes:
- Add parse metrics (statement count counter) with snapshot/reset API and
  tracing span instrumentation on parse_all() for observability.
- Fix block comment lexing to match SQLite behavior: SQLite does not support
  nested block comments, so remove the depth-tracking nesting logic.
- Promote oversized integer literals to REAL (f64) matching SQLite's behavior
  instead of returning an error.
- Change keyword-to-string helper to emit lowercase (matching SQLite's
  canonical keyword casing in error messages).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
